expectations.text: template: dynamic class via wx:class (not class string interpolation)
template: event params use inline syntax (not data- dataset)
template: no method calls in Mustache (getStatusColor/getStatusText replaced)
template: page scroll replaced with scroll-view
template: scroll-view has bindscrolltolower or equivalent
script: all wx.xxx API replaced with mpx.xxx
style on RN: no .btn-default .btn-text compound selector
template: wx:style object keys use unquoted camelCase (no quoted or kebab-case keys)
